_doc: Single source of truth for portable postgres/redis binaries hosted at https://embeds.langwatch.ai. Read by both packages/server/src/predeps/{postgres,redis}.ts (URL construction) and .github/workflows/embedded-binaries-publish.yml (build matrix). Bump versions here, run the publish workflow, predeps auto-pick the new tarballs on next CLI run.

postgres._install_layout: tarball strips to bin/postgres + lib/ + share/ rooted at <paths.bin>/postgres/

redis._install_layout: tarball contains a single redis-server binary at <paths.bin>/redis-server
redis._license_note: 7.4.x is BSD-3-Clause. Redis 8.x switched to AGPLv3+RSAL — pinning to 7.4 keeps embedding terms simple for self-hosters.
